description_for_human: Read the fund's deals from the Deal Room MCP server.
description_for_model: Retrieves the fund's deals (list_deals, get_deal, search_deals) from the Deal Room's Entra-secured MCP endpoint.

functions.name: list_deals
functions.description: Every deal as a compact summary (id, company, sector, stage, status, size, IC readiness, days-to-IC, thesis).

functions.name: get_deal
functions.description: One deal as a bounded analyst view (key figures, diligence workstreams, memo/compliance status, top risks).

functions.name: search_deals
functions.description: Keyword search across company / sector / thesis.
